code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let c = match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(x)
            x
          when None
            0
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    let n = xs.len()
    mut inserted = false
    while i < n
      let v = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        0
      end
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn merge_into(_ acc: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      0
    end
    result = insert_sorted_unique(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
sorted = merge_into(sorted, nums1)
sorted = merge_into(sorted, nums2)

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let total = sorted.len()
while k < total
  let v = match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
